en: The word of the LORD came to Jeremiah a second time, while he was still shut up in the court of the guard:
zh: 耶利米還監禁在衛兵院子裡的時候，耶和華的話第二次臨到他，說：

en: "Thus says the LORD who made the earth, the LORD who formed it to establish it- the LORD is his name:
zh: “那創造、塑造和堅定大地的是耶和華，耶和華是他的名。他這樣說：

en: Call to me and I will answer you, and will tell you great and hidden things that you have not known.
zh: ‘你呼求我，我就應允你，並且把你所不知道的那些偉大奧祕的事告訴你。’

en: For thus says the LORD, the God of Israel, concerning the houses of this city and the houses of the kings of Judah that were torn down to make a defense against the siege mounds and against the sword:
zh: 論到這城裡的房屋和猶大王的宮殿，就是為了抵擋敵人的攻城土壘和刀劍而拆毀的，耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：

en: They are coming in to fight against the Chaldeans and to fill them with the dead bodies of men whom I shall strike down in my anger and my wrath, for I have hidden my face from this city because of all their evil.
zh: ‘這城的居民出去和迦勒底人爭戰，就必使這些房屋充滿死屍，就是我在怒氣和烈怒中擊殺的。因為他們的一切惡行，我掩面不顧這城。

en: Behold, I will bring to it health and healing, and I will heal them and reveal to them abundance of prosperity and security.
zh: 看哪！我必使這城的傷口痊愈康復，我必醫治城中的居民，並且使他們享有十分的平安和穩妥。

en: I will restore the fortunes of Judah and the fortunes of Israel, and rebuild them as they were at first.
zh: 我必使猶大被擄的和以色列被擄的都歸回，並且建立他們像起初一樣。

en: I will cleanse them from all the guilt of their sin against me, and I will forgive all the guilt of their sin and rebellion against me.
zh: 我必潔淨他們得罪我的一切罪孽，並且赦免他們得罪我和悖逆我的一切罪孽。

en: And this city shall be to me a name of joy, a praise and a glory before all the nations of the earth who shall hear of all the good that I do for them. They shall fear and tremble because of all the good and all the prosperity I provide for it.
zh: 這城必在地上萬國面前使我得名聲，得喜樂 ，得頌讚，得榮耀，因為萬國必聽見我向這城的人所施的一切福樂。他們因我向這城所施的一切福樂和平安，就都恐懼戰兢。’

en: "Thus says the LORD: In this place of which you say, 'It is a waste without man or beast,' in the cities of Judah and the streets of Jerusalem that are desolate, without man or inhabitant or beast, there shall be heard again
zh: “耶和華這樣說：‘論到這地方，你們說：“這地荒廢，沒有人煙，也沒有牲畜。”但在這荒涼、沒有人煙、沒有居民、也沒有牲畜的猶大各城和耶路撒冷的街上，必再聽見

en: the voice of mirth and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom and the voice of the bride, the voices of those who sing, as they bring thank offerings to the house of the LORD: "' Give thanks to the LORD of hosts, for the LORD is good, for his steadfast love endures forever!' For I will restore the fortunes of the land as at first, says the LORD.
zh: 歡喜和快樂的聲音，新郎和新婦的聲音；還要聽見那些帶著感恩祭到耶和華殿的人的聲音說：“你們要稱謝萬軍之耶和華，因為耶和華是至善的，他的慈愛永遠長存。”因為我必使這地被擄的歸回，像起初一樣。’”這是耶和華說的。

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts: In this place that is waste, without man or beast, and in all of its cities, there shall again be habitations of shepherds resting their flocks.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘在這荒廢、沒有人煙、沒有牲畜的地方，和這地所有城中，必再有牧人放羊的牧場。

en: In the cities of the hill country, in the cities of the Shephelah, and in the cities of the Negeb, in the land of Benjamin, the places about Jerusalem, and in the cities of Judah, flocks shall again pass under the hands of the one who counts them, says the LORD.
zh: 在山地、高地和南地的各城，在便雅憫地，在耶路撒冷周圍的各處，以及在猶大的各城裡，必再有牧人數點經過手下的羊群。’”這是耶和華說的。

en: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will fulfill the promise I made to the house of Israel and the house of Judah.
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，我必實踐我向以色列家和猶大家應許賜福的諾言。

en: In those days and at that time I will cause a righteous Branch to spring up for David, and he shall execute justice and righteousness in the land.
zh: 在那些日子、那時候，我必使大衛公義的苗裔長起來；他必在地上施行公正和公義。

en: In those days Judah will be saved and Jerusalem will dwell securely. And this is the name by which it will be called: 'The LORD is our righteousness.'
zh: 在那些日子，猶大必得救，耶路撒冷必安然居住；這城必被稱為‘耶和華是我們的公義’。

en: "For thus says the LORD: David shall never lack a man to sit on the throne of the house of Israel,
zh: 因為耶和華這樣說：‘大衛家必不斷有人坐在以色列家的王位上。

en: and the Levitical priests shall never lack a man in my presence to offer burnt offerings, to burn grain offerings, and to make sacrifices forever."
zh: 利未人的祭司也必不斷有人在我面前獻上燔祭和燒素祭；獻祭的事永不止息。’”

en: The word of the LORD came to Jeremiah:
zh: 耶和華說的話臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Thus says the LORD: If you can break my covenant with the day and my covenant with the night, so that day and night will not come at their appointed time,
zh: “耶和華這樣說：‘你們若能廢掉我所立白晝和黑夜的約，使白晝和黑夜不按時更替，

en: then also my covenant with David my servant may be broken, so that he shall not have a son to reign on his throne, and my covenant with the Levitical priests my ministers.
zh: 就能廢掉我和我僕人大衛所立的約，使他沒有兒子在他的王位上作王；也能廢掉我和那些事奉我的利未支派的祭司所立的約。

en: As the host of heaven cannot be numbered and the sands of the sea cannot be measured, so I will multiply the offspring of David my servant, and the Levitical priests who minister to me."
zh: 我卻必使我僕人大衛的後裔和事奉我的利未人增多，像天上的萬象不能數算、海邊的沙粒不能斗量。’”

en: The word of the LORD came to Jeremiah:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Have you not observed that these people are saying, 'The LORD has rejected the two clans that he chose'? Thus they have despised my people so that they are no longer a nation in their sight.
zh: “你沒有留意列國的人民說甚麼嗎？他們說：‘耶和華所揀選的這兩個家族，他已經棄絕了。’他們藐視我的子民，不再把他們看為一個國家。

en: Thus says the LORD: If I have not established my covenant with day and night and the fixed order of heaven and earth,
zh: 耶和華這樣說：‘我若沒有設立白晝和黑夜的約，或立定天地的定律，

en: then I will reject the offspring of Jacob and David my servant and will not choose one of his offspring to rule over the offspring of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob. For I will restore their fortunes and will have mercy on them."
zh: 我就會棄絕雅各的後裔，和我僕人大衛的後裔，不從大衛的後裔中選人出來統治亞伯拉罕、以撒和雅各的後裔。我卻必使他們被擄的人歸回，也必憐憫他們。’”
